Classify this LBA2 game screenshot against the expected checkpoint. Return strict JSON only. The checkpoint_id field must exactly equal the supplied checkpoint_id. Include a non-empty summary that justifies every boolean field.

{
  "checkpoint_id": "capability_behavior_accel_otringal_aggressive",
  "save": "otringal-open.LBA",
  "visual_source": "live_window_capture",
  "scene_description": "An open outdoor Otringal city area suitable for forward movement testing.",
  "target_description": "Open walking space ahead of Twinsen, without an immediate wall or menu blocking movement.",
  "expected": {
    "twinsen_visible": true,
    "target_visible": true,
    "ui_state": "gameplay",
    "unsafe_pose_signs": false
  },
  "summary_must_mention": [
    "Twinsen",
    "open",
    "gameplay"
  ],
  "response_schema": "game-drive-visual-classification-v1"
}
stdout_tail: {"schema":"game-drive-visual-classification-v1","checkpoint_id":"capability_behavior_accel_otringal_aggressive","matches":true,"confidence":"high","summary":"Twinsen is visible near the lower center of the live gameplay view, standing in an open outdoor Otringal plaza with clear walking space ahead and no immediate wall blocking forward movement. The target open area is visible, the UI is normal gameplay with no menu or dialog overlay, and there are no unsafe pose signs such as falling, clipping, or incapacitation.","observed":{"twinsen_visible":true,"target_visible":true,"ui_state":"gameplay","unsafe_pose_signs":false},"mismatches":[]}
